full_citation: Benyamim Tsedaka, 'Samaritans: Statistics,' Encyclopaedia Judaica, 2nd ed.; A.B. notes: Evidence chain: 1934=206; 1948=58 Israel + 250 Shechem = 308; 1 Jan 1954=87 Holon + 226 Nablus = 313; c.1961=about 150 Holon + 200 Nablus; 1963=350; the 1967 census counted 139 in Nablus district alone; 1970=430.
